EmailTemplate.description: Send Email to Sourcing after 7 days of Temp Creation for Registration
EmailTemplate.name: Send Email to Sourcing after 7 days of Temp Creation
EmailTemplate.subject: Reminder: Temporary Channel Partner Registration Pending – {!Broker__c.Name}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Broker__c.CreatedBy},
This is a gentle reminder that 7 days have passed since the creation of Temporary Channel Partner {!Broker__c.Name}, and the registration process is still pending.
Kindly ensure that the registration is completed at the earliest to avoid delays in onboarding, payment, or portal access.
Click on link to apply for registration :-
Portal Onboarding Link
Regards Runwal Enterprises
